name: button-unfilled-icon
title: ButtonUnfilledIcon
description: Square unfilled icon button for chrome actions, overflow triggers, and tool rail actions. Supports active, active-without-fill, bordered, dot, inactive, and surface-aware interaction states.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by ButtonUnfilledIcon. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.
Used internally by ButtonUnfilledIcon. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

isActive.description: Active/selected state. Active always promotes icon color.

activeFill.description: Set false for shell chrome that needs active icon color without active fill.

background.description: Surface context for interaction and focus tokens.
